sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁמיר

Transliteration: shâmı̂yr

Phonetic: shaw-meer'

BDB Definition:

Shamir = "a point" or " thorn"
  1. a town in the mountain district of Judah
  2. a town in Ephraim where the judge Tola lived and was buried

Origin: the same as H8068

TWOT entry: pr n loc

Part(s) of speech:
